description: Unique journey ID (IR + 8 digits)
5-digit IR train number
Type of train (Vande Bharat, Rajdhani, Mail, Passenger, etc.)
Scheduled departure date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Month (1–12)
Day of week (0=Monday, 6=Sunday)
Scheduled departure hour (0–23)
1 if Saturday or Sunday
1 if departure between 10pm and 4am
1 if departure during peak commute hours (6–8am, 5–8pm)
1 if high-demand festival period (Diwali, Eid, Holi etc.)
Season: Winter/Fog | Summer | Pre-Monsoon | Monsoon | Post-Monsoon | Autumn
IR administrative zone (e.g. Northern Railway, Eastern Railway)
Zone abbreviation (NR, ER, WR, SR etc.)
IR category of origin station (A1 > A > B > C > D > E)
IR category of destination station
Total route distance in kilometres
Number of intermediate scheduled halts
Scheduled end-to-end travel time in hours
1 if most of route is on doubled or quadrupled track
1 if route passes through High Density Network corridor
Traction: Electric (25kV AC) | Diesel | Dual
1 if route is fully electrified (Electric or Dual traction)
Number of Permanent Speed Restrictions on the route
1 if train operates as a circular or loop service
1 if departure month is June–September
1 if fog risk conditions apply (Dec–Feb, morning, fog-prone zone)
Continuous fog risk score (0–1) based on month, hour, and zone
Historical fog-related delay risk for the zone (0–1)
Route network capacity utilisation index for the zone (0–1)
Weather severity index for the month (0–1; 0.90=Aug, 0.25=Mar)
Age of the locomotive in years
Average age of passenger coaches in years
1 if train uses modern LHB (Linke-Hofmann-Busch) coaches
1 if the rake (trainset) is shared across multiple services
Preventive maintenance quality score (1=poor, 10=excellent)
Passengers boarded as % of seating capacity
1 if seat utilisation exceeds 100%
1 if the incoming rake (previous service) was already running late
1 if this is a special or seasonal train (not in regular timetable)
Historical on-time arrival % for this route (based on past data)
[TRAIN SET ONLY] Primary cause of delay or "On Time"
[TRAIN SET ONLY] Actual delay at destination in minutes (0 if on time)
[TARGET] 1 = train arrived more than 15 minutes late at destination
